general.report_title: Python Basics - Day 9 Homework Grading Report

online_content.description: Review how to define functions, pass parameters, and return values instead of printing everything directly.
linked_tests: Hour 33 - functions with parameters and return values

online_content.description: Default arguments, clean function calls, and the basics-friendly habit of passing values explicitly instead of relying on globals.
linked_tests: Hour 34 - scope, shadowing, and default parameters

online_content.description: Working with lists and dictionaries inside functions, especially when deciding whether to mutate data or return a new collection.
linked_tests: Hour 35 - functions with collections and mutation decisions

online_content.description: Import styles, module organization, and why naming your own file after a standard-library module causes import problems.
linked_tests: Hour 36 - imports, custom helpers, and module naming safety
